name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 25 Apr 2023
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we added a new metric to the product feed feature and introduced a consolidated view of a contact's order history in the form of the Order Details page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"For more details, please scroll down!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENTS","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"New Product Feed Metric – Top Trending","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now create a product feed consisting of your top trending products, meaning products showing a surge in popularity. When creating the product feed, select the new metric – Top Trending and select the time frame for data to be considered."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Notes: "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Best sellers are the products that are selling the most quantities whereas top trending are the products that are showing great improvement in sales quantities."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":" A product is considered as trending if the sale quantity shows an increase of 5 or more. So, depending on your growth in sales, you may or may not have any trending products."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about Product Feeds, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Product-Feeds","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Product Feeds","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewProductFeedRN.0685g00000DatJGAAZ.jpg","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewProductFeedRN.0685g00000DatJGAAZ.jpg","name":"New Product Feed RN","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":2572,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Introducing the Order Details Page","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can now see all the orders placed by a contact in one place, that is, on the Order Details page. The page is accessible from the Contact Overview by clicking the order count on the engagement card."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about contact overview, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Viewing-a-Contact-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Viewing a Contact Overview","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContactOverviewOrders.0685g00000DatIcAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/ContactOverviewOrders.0685g00000DatIcAAJ.png","name":"Contact Overview - Orders","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1168,"width":2560}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Order Details page displays details that include the order number, order status, total order value, order date, and the source from which the order details were captured."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderDetailsPage.0685g00000DasWfAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/OrderDetailsPage.0685g00000DasWfAAJ.png","name":"Order Details Page","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":1168,"width":2560}}]}]
